zh.lifeSummary: 當Glismund von Sachsen於大約0975年出生在薩辛時，她的父親Graf Immed IV von Sachsen23歲，母親Adèle van Gent21歲。她和Adalbert Margrave of Austria至少有2個兒子。她去世於1041年2月5日之前在可特格希 貝也。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Sachsen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Rainer, Armin, Claus, Heinz, Hildegarde, Johannes, Kurt, Wolfgang.

variants.name: Sachs
meanings: German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from Lower Saxony (German Niedersachsen) in northern Germany. The region is named for the ancient Germanic tribe that settled there in Roman times, whose name derives from an ancient Germanic word (preserved in Old Saxon and Old High German), sahs ‘knife, sword’. The area in central Germany called Sachsen was named after the line of princes who owned title to the northern territories in 1422.
Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): surname adopted in memory of persecuted forebears, an acronym of the Hebrew phrase Zera Qodesh SHemo ‘his name is of the seed of holiness’. Compare Socks and Zacks .

en.lifeSummary: When Glismund von Sachsen was born about 0975, in Saxony, her father, Graf Immed IV von Sachsen, was 23 and her mother, Adèle van Gent, was 21. She had at least 2 sons with Adalbert Margrave of Austria. She died before 5 February 1041, in Bavaria.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Glismund von Sachsen est née environ 0975, à Sachsen, son père, Graf Immed IV von Sachsen, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Adèle van Gent, avait 21 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils avec Adalbert Margrave of Austria. Elle est décédée avant 5 février 1041, à Königreich Bayern.

de.lifeSummary: Als Glismund von Sachsen um 0975 in Sachsen geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Graf Immed IV von Sachsen 23 und ihre Mutter Adèle van Gent 21. Sie hatte mit Adalbert Margrave of Austria mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb vor 5. Februar 1041 in Königreich Bayern.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Glismund von Sachsen è nata il circa 0975 nel Sachsen, sua padre, Graf Immed IV von Sachsen, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Adèle van Gent, aveva 21 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli con Adalbert Margrave of Austria. Morì prima del 5 febbraio 1041, nel Königreich Bayern.

ja.lifeSummary: Glismund von Sachsenが約0975年にサチセンで生まれた時，父Graf Immed IV von Sachsenは23歳，母Adèle van Gentは21歳であった。彼女はAdalbert Margrave of Austriaとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1041年2月5日以前にクoニグレイチ バイエルンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Glismund von Sachsen(이)가 대략 0975년 작센에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Graf Immed IV von Sachsen(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adèle van Gent(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 Adalbert Margrave of Austria(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1041년 2월 5일 이전 ko니그레이치 베이른에서 사망했다.

mn.environ 0975–avant 5 février 1041: ойролцоогоор 0975 он–1041 оны Хоёрдугаар сарын 5–наас өмнө

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Glismund von Sachsen nasceu aproximadamente 0975, em Sachsen, seu pai, Graf Immed IV von Sachsen, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Adèle van Gent, tinha 21 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos com Adalbert Margrave of Austria. Ela faleceu antes 5 de fevereiro de 1041, em Königreich Bayern.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Glismund von Sachsen родилась около 0975 г. в местности сачсен, её отцу по имени Graf Immed IV von Sachsen было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Adèle van Gent, 21. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына от Adalbert Margrave of Austria. Она умерла перед 5 февраль 1041 г. в местности кoниграич беиирн.

sm.environ 0975–avant 5 février 1041: e tusa o le 0975–a'e le'I oo le 5 Fepuari 1041

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Glismund von Sachsen nació aproximadamente 0975, en Sachsen, su papá, Graf Immed IV von Sachsen, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Adèle van Gent, tenía 21 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos con Adalbert Margrave of Austria. Murió antes de 5 de febrero de 1041, en Königreich Bayern.
